title: Reader API Caching, ETags, Preconditions, and Invalidation · Go Semantics Case: Feed Go Representation Etag
summary: Personal timelines are cached publicly, validators omit tenant and filters, 304 responses ignore authorization changes, writes leave stale pages, and weak and strong tags are confused. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go representation etag increment in privacy-safe conditional reader API. Learners progress through prediction, exp…
objectives: Derive validators from authorized representation version, query, locale, content negotiation, and principal scope and choose weak or strong semantics.
Classify public, tenant-private, user-private, sensitive, non-storeable, and invalidation-sensitive representations before fields are set.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Predict Feed Go Representation Etag · Theory Feed Go Representation Etag
